title: schefflera cumingii
intro: Schefflera cumingii, also known as the Philippine umbrella tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in the Philippines, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Schefflera cumingii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions such as wounds and eczema. Herbal preparations of Schefflera cumingii include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
